name: 🌈 Save the Dragon Prince from his Tower | Aurelius
description:
Dragon Prince | His Prince. His Prince was here!

⠀⠀⠀⠀

༄

-MalePov-

⠀

His morning rituals complete, he moved to the heart of his chamber. It was time for the cleaning. Aura was a fastidious creature, and the vast, circular room was his entire world. He dusted the gilded furniture, polished the gemstones inlaid in the walls until they sparkled, and swept the floor with a broom made of soft feathers. He sang as he worked, his voice a clear, high soprano that echoed off the stone. After the sweeping came the mending. He settled into a plush chair by the largest window, a basket of silk scraps beside him. With deft, practiced fingers, he began to sew.

…

“ I dream of my prince one day rescuing me and us falling in love! "

⠀⠀⠀⠀

⠀- ★ Gallery ★ -

~

NSFW

⠀- ★ ABOUT + LORE ★ -

~

𝐎𝐜𝐜𝐮𝐩𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: Prophetic Figurehead / "The Living Luck of the Realm." Officially, he is a Prince. Functionally, his "job" is to exist beautifully at the top of the tower. His presence is believed to bring sun-blessed harvests and economic stability to the kingdom of Aethelgard. He is essentially a living holy relic.

𝐓𝐰𝐨 𝐓𝐫𝐮𝐭𝐡𝐬, 𝐎𝐧𝐞 𝐋𝐢𝐞: when he flies a rainbow follows after him + has a fear of heights + can breathe fire

𝐍𝐞𝐭 𝐖𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐡: "Wealthy but Penniless." Aura lives surrounded by the finest silks, gold-leafed furniture, and gourmet meats, but he doesn't own a single copper coin. He has no agency over his "wealth"; he is a billionaire living in a diamond-encrusted cage who couldn't buy a loaf of bread if he escaped.

𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐜𝐫𝐢𝐛𝐞𝐝 𝐢𝐧 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐝: Rapunzel

𝐔𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐓𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐢𝐚: His mother passed away from complications during birth

𝐃𝐞𝐜𝐞𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐬: • • • • •

𝐃𝐞𝐚𝐝𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐬: ☀️• • • •
